overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The scene transitions from a dark concrete stairwell to a sunlit pedestrian walkway beneath massive highway overpasses, passing neon billboards and futuristic architecture before ending with a view of a distinctive yellow industrial tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with fluorescent tube lighting

events.description: exiting dark stairwell into bright outdoor sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs toward the bright exit

entered.detail: enclosed concrete stairwell with dark walls and overhead cover
long rectangular fluorescent light fixture on the left wall
long rectangular fluorescent light fixture on the right wall
concrete steps leading upward toward the exit

segments.scene_description: The clip begins in a dark, enclosed concrete stairwell illuminated by fluorescent tube lights. The camera ascends the stairs toward a bright exit, transitioning from the artificial indoor lighting to natural outdoor sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway under highway overpasses

events.description: beginning to follow a pedestrian wearing a yellow plaid shirt

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange pathway following a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt walking steadily ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with multiple levels spanning across the scene
distinctive orange-tiled pedestrian pathway with red border stripes
steep concrete ramp structure running parallel to the walkway
large advertising billboard visible in the distance under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairwell into bright midday sun, the scene opens onto an orange-tiled pedestrian walkway beneath massive highway overpasses. The camera follows a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt while futuristic vehicles pass on the left and concrete ramps rise on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian approach to underpass with advertising billboards

events.description: pedestrian in plaid shirt moves to the right and exits frame, camera continues following a different pedestrian in gray coat

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the plaid shirt pedestrian exits right, now following a pedestrian in a gray coat toward the underpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray coat walking ahead toward the shaded underpass area

entered.detail: large billboard displaying 'KEEP IT SAFE' text with a red downward trending graph
purple billboard with 'SET SAIL' text visible on the left side

segments.scene_description: As the plaid shirt pedestrian moves aside, the camera continues toward the underpass now following a pedestrian in a gray coat. Large billboards become visible overhead including one with 'KEEP IT SAFE' messaging, while the highway structure looms closer overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded underpass beneath highway with corporate buildings visible

events.description: entering deep shadow under the highway overpass as sunlight becomes blocked
passing a group of pedestrians standing and walking under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the shadowed underpass passing groups of pedestrians and observing the urban architecture

notable_agents.action: group of four pedestrians standing together under the overpass, some wearing bright colored shirts

entered.detail: tall white corporate building with green 'Biotechnica' signage visible in the distance
yellow construction scaffolding and equipment on the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the shadowed underpass beneath the highway where lighting shifts to mixed shadows. Passing a group of pedestrians, the view opens to reveal the Biotechnica tower rising in the distance while traffic moves along the right side and construction scaffolding appears on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with view of distinctive yellow industrial tower

events.description: turning left to face the yellow tower building and surrounding street
transitioning from underpass shadow to open street view with tall buildings and overhead wires

agents.ego_description: turning left to observe the yellow tower and surrounding street traffic, then panning upward to view the building height

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving along the street with headlights on

entered.detail: tall distinctive yellow industrial building with ':04' signage and red warning lights near the top
dense network of electrical wires and cables crisscrossing overhead

segments.scene_description: Turning left away from the underpass, the camera reveals a bustling street scene with the distinctive yellow industrial tower dominating the left side. The camera pans upward along the tower's height, showing overhead power lines crisscrossing the blue sky while traffic moves along the street and pedestrians walk the sidewalks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dim, enclosed concrete stairwell into a sprawling, sunlit futuristic cityscape. It begins by ascending the stairs under fluorescent tube lights, moving toward a bright exit that shifts the lighting from artificial gloom to brilliant midday sun. As the camera emerges onto an orange-tiled pedestrian walkway, it glides past people in plaid and gray coats beneath massive highway overpasses and towering billboards. The scene then enters the mixed shadows of a highway underpass, passing groups of pedestrians before the view opens to reveal the distant Biotechnica tower and surrounding construction scaffolding. Finally, the camera turns left away from the underpass to reveal a bustling street, panning upward along a massive yellow industrial tower that reaches toward a blue sky crisscrossed by power lines.
